options.name: -bottom
options.description: Specifies the mask color for the bottom layer of selected vias.

options.name: -cut
options.description: Specifies the mask color for the cut layer of selected vias.

options.name: -to
options.description: Specifies the mask color for the selected wires or physical pins.

options.name: -top
options.description: Specifies the mask color for the top layer of selected vias.

options.name: -trim_metal
options.description: Specifies the mask color for the trim metal.
